query:
UPDATE guests SET
                        name = $2,
                        phone = COALESCE($3, phone),
                        email = COALESCE($4, email),
                        plus_ones = COALESCE($5, plus_ones),
                        dietary = CASE WHEN $6 = '' THEN dietary ELSE $6 END,
                        notes = CASE WHEN $7 = '' THEN notes ELSE $7 END,
                        updated_at = now()
                    WHERE id = $1
